field_values.action_summary: Carter exits the cave, emerging into the bright, harsh light of the Arizona landscape, realizing he has returned to Earth.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide shots of the vast landscape; High-key desert lighting vs cave darkness; Lens flares during exit transitions
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Rapid exposure shift from dark cave to high-key desert sunlight
Physical state and clothing condition of john_carter post-cave exit
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH028_SC003

## Production Intent
Transition the protagonist from a state of immediate survival threat within a dark cave to the overwhelming sensory experience of the Arizona desert. The scene must establish the geographical shift through extreme lighting contrast and scale.

## Required Cast
- john_carter

## Required Environments
- arizona_desert_landscape (Exterior)
- Cave Interior/Mouth

## Continuity Constraints
- Rapid exposure shift from dark cave to high-key desert sunlight
- Physical state and clothing condition of john_carter post-cave exit

## Beat List
- BT001: Movement toward the light
- BT002: The light breakthrough
- BT003: Realization of Earth
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
